environment: no anchors; GT used only by full-score/delivery evaluators
implementation: Starting from the current best assignment, compare each residual candidate assignment against the same base, extract changed seq rows, reject conflicts, compose rank06 and rank07, then run direct full-score followed by density_simple and p005_area. Evidence uses only current assignment state and cached weakmetric/OSNet, DINOv2, and SigLIP tracklet features; GT appears only in the evaluator.
module_detail: Graph resolution: after the previous four-tracklet feature-outlier combo, search residual one-tracklet islands and compose only independent positive moves before canonical delivery validation.
next: Use this residual reviewer as the gate for generated positives: a generated/synthetic positive must reinforce a local outlier island, pass source-specific DINO/SigLIP CTF, and clear direct plus p005 delivery before entering best.

summary: A two-tracklet residual feature-outlier combo improves canonical p005_area IDF1 from 0.668508 to 0.668673 (+0.000165) without anchors.
title: Residual Feature-Outlier Combo Rank06+Rank07 P005 Gain

visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous best left seq1548 in component 86 even though its multi-feature evidence preferred component 91, creating a residual false split beside an already accepted neighbor.
visual_cases.improvement: The new combo moves only seq1548 and pairs it with one independent MCAM04/Tc6 outlier; p005 validates the combined identity decision.
visual_cases.summary: Three sampled bbox frames show the residual MCAM03/Tc6 tracklet moved after the previous combo had already moved seq685 into component 91.
visual_cases.title: Residual relink seq1548: component 86 -> 91

visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous best kept seq4043 in component 86, but feature-outlier evidence and source/target margins favored component 37.
visual_cases.improvement: The reviewer keeps the repair local, avoids broad component merge, and promotes it only when composed with rank06 through direct, density_simple, and p005_area gates.
visual_cases.summary: Three sampled bbox frames show the MCAM04/Tc6 one-tracklet island moved from component 86 to component 37.
visual_cases.title: Residual relink seq4043: component 86 -> 37

workflow_steps.action: keep only material direct positives rank06 and rank07
